<!-- publications start -->
::: {.pub-item}
**[Unravelling 2,4-D – biochar interactions by molecular dynamics: adsorption modes and surface functionalities](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biombioe.2026.109080)**
<br>*Biomass and Bioenergy* · 2026
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**[MapReader: Open software for the visual analysis of maps](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.06434)**
<br>*Journal of Open Source Software* · 2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**[Reading Maps at a Distance: Texts on Maps as New Historical Data](https://doi.org/10.1080/03085694.2024.2453336)**
<br>*Imago Mundi* · 2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**[Developing a molecular-level understanding of biochar materials using public characterization data](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xcrp.2024.102036)**
<br>*Cell Reports Physical Science* · 2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**[Developing realistic molecular models of biochars](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.xcrp.2024.102037)**
<br>*Cell Reports Physical Science* · 2024
:::

::: {.pub-item}
**[MapReader](https://doi.org/10.5281/ZENODO.8189653)**
<br>*Zenodo* · 2023
:::

<!-- publications end -->
